changes: Arm of the Destroyer: grants Raptor Chakra even when missing a target under Perfect Balance
Rockbreaker: grants Opo-opo Chakra even when missing a target under Perfect Balance
Four-point Fury: grants Coeurl Chakra even when missing a target under Perfect Balance
Shadow of the Destroyer: grants Raptor Chakra even when missing a target under Perfect Balance
Elixir Field: grants Lunar Nadi and Formless Fist even when missing a target
Flint Strike: grants Solar Nadi and Formless Fist even when missing a target
Rising Phoenix: grants Solar Nadi and Formless Fist even when missing a target
Wyrmwind Thrust: Potency increased from 370 to 420
Geirskogul: Potency increased from 250 to 260
Nastrond: Potency increased from 350 to 360
Raiton: Status changed to Raiju Ready; duration increased to 30s
Bunshin: Phantom Kamaitachi Ready status no longer expires when Bunshin ends; changes to Phantom Kamaitachi upon execution; duration 45s
Phantom Kamaitachi: No longer consumes Bunshin stack; Ninki gauge increase changed from 5 to 10
Forked Raiju: Potency increased from 400 to 560; execution requirement changed to Raiju Ready
Fleeting Raiju: No longer rushes target; range reduced to 3 yalms; potency increased from 450 to 560; execution requirement changed to Raiju Ready
Higanbana: Range increased from 3 to 6 yalms
Kaeshi: Higanbana: Range increased from 3 to 6 yalms
Midare Setsugekka: Range increased from 3 to 6 yalms
Kaeshi: Setsugekka: Range increased from 3 to 6 yalms
Arcane Crest: Cure potency of Crest of Time Returned reduced from 100 to 50
Standard Finish: Category changed from ability to weaponskill
Technical Finish: Category changed from ability to weaponskill
Tillana: Category changed from ability to weaponskill
Fountain of Fire: Potency increased from 430 to 520
Brand of Purgatory: Potency increased from 180 to 240
Fey Union: Range increased from 15 to 30 yalms; tether range increased from 15 to 30 yalms
